description: Style NoteThese tops are this season's winners because of the use of simple styling techniques that spruce up the entire look without going overboard. Summery and cool, this top from wills lifestyle can be worn with trousers or shorts for a look that's sure to make heads turn.   Product DetailsBlue top, has a cowl neck, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, sequin detail in front and ribbed hemlineMaterial and Care100% viscoseDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model height (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
